requirement_topic.en: EMC — Electromagnetic Compatibility for EV Charging Equipment
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——电动汽车充电设备的电磁兼容性
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——電動汽車充電設備的電磁相容性

summary.en: Brazil adopts CISPR standards (from IEC's International Special Committee on Radio Interference) as ABNT NBR standards — the applicable series for EV charging equipment includes ABNT NBR CISPR 11 (industrial, scientific, and medical equipment emissions), ABNT NBR CISPR 14-1 (household appliances and similar — emissions), and ABNT NBR IEC 61000 series (electromagnetic compatibility — immunity and emission limits). Whether a confirmed INMETRO compulsory certification scheme specifically for EVSE is in force (which would make EMC compulsory as part of that scheme) must be verified at portaria.inmetro.gov.br — a confirmed compulsory EVSE scheme could not be verified as of 2026-06-12. The specific EMC standard referenced in any applicable INMETRO Portaria should be confirmed on the INMETRO portal.
summary.zh: 巴西将IEC国际无线电干扰特别委员会（CISPR）标准以ABNT NBR形式采纳——适用于充电设备的相关系列包括ABNT NBR CISPR 11（工业、科学和医疗设备发射）、ABNT NBR CISPR 14-1（家用电器等——发射）以及ABNT NBR IEC 61000系列（电磁兼容——抗扰度及发射限值）。专门针对EVSE的INMETRO强制认证方案是否有效实施（若有效，则EMC将作为强制方案的组成部分），须在portaria.inmetro.gov.br核实——截至2026年6月12日，专门针对EVSE的强制方案未能确认。任何适用INMETRO Portaria中引用的具体EMC标准应在INMETRO门户确认。
summary.zht: 巴西將IEC國際無線電干擾特別委員會（CISPR）標準以ABNT NBR形式採納——適用於充電設備的相關系列包括ABNT NBR CISPR 11（工業、科學和醫療設備發射）、ABNT NBR CISPR 14-1（家用電器等——發射）以及ABNT NBR IEC 61000系列（電磁相容——抗擾度及發射限值）。專門針對EVSE的INMETRO強制認證方案是否有效實施（若有效，則EMC將作為強制方案的組成部分），須在portaria.inmetro.gov.br核實——截至2026年6月12日，專門針對EVSE的強制方案未能確認。任何適用INMETRO Portaria中引用的具體EMC標準應在INMETRO門戶確認。

standards_or_laws: ABNT NBR CISPR 11 — Industrial, scientific and medical equipment — Radio-frequency disturbance characteristics — Limits and methods of measurement (Brazilian adoption of CISPR 11)
ABNT NBR IEC 61000-3-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions (Brazilian adoption of IEC 61000-3-2)
ABNT NBR IEC 61000-3-3 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limitation of voltage changes, voltage fluctuations and flicker (Brazilian adoption of IEC 61000-3-3)
ABNT NBR IEC 61000-4 series — Electromagnetic compatibility — Immunity requirements (Brazilian adoptions of IEC 61000-4-x series)

summary.en: China's EMC requirements for EV charging equipment are covered under GB/T 17799 series (Electromagnetic compatibility — Generic standards, adopted from IEC 61000-6 series) and GB 4824 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of industrial, scientific and medical equipment — adopted from CISPR 11). For EV chargers specifically, GB/T 18487.1-2015 includes EMC test requirements. CCC certification may include EMC as a test item. However, Chinese GB/T EMC test reports are not accepted as equivalent to INMETRO-scheme ABNT NBR EMC tests.
summary.zh: 中国充电设备的EMC要求涵盖在GB/T 17799系列（电磁兼容——通用标准，源自IEC 61000-6系列）和GB 4824（工业、科学和医疗设备无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法——源自CISPR 11）中。针对充电设备，GB/T 18487.1-2015包含EMC测试要求。CCC认证可能将EMC作为测试项目。但中国GB/T EMC测试报告不被接受为等同于INMETRO体系ABNT NBR EMC测试的文件。
summary.zht: 中國充電設備的EMC要求涵蓋在GB/T 17799系列（電磁相容——通用標準，源自IEC 61000-6系列）和GB 4824（工業、科學和醫療設備無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法——源自CISPR 11）中。針對充電設備，GB/T 18487.1-2015包含EMC測試要求。CCC認證可能將EMC作為測試項目。但中國GB/T EMC測試報告不被接受為等同於INMETRO體系ABNT NBR EMC測試的文件。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 17799 series — Electromagnetic compatibility — Generic standards (based on IEC 61000-6 series; SAMR/SAC)
GB 4824-2019 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of industrial, scientific and medical equipment (based on CISPR 11:2015+A1:2016; SAMR/SAC)

gap.en: EMC test reports from Chinese CNAS laboratories to GB/T 17799 or GB 4824 are not accepted as substitutes for INMETRO-scheme testing under ABNT NBR CISPR/IEC 61000 standards. Fresh EMC testing must be performed by an INMETRO-recognised OL (laboratory) against the ABNT NBR standards specified in the applicable INMETRO Portaria. Additionally, the 60 Hz grid frequency affects harmonic emission measurements — EMC tests conducted at 50 Hz for Chinese domestic certification do not cover 60 Hz operation, and re-testing at 60 Hz is required.
gap.zh: 中国CNAS实验室依据GB/T 17799或GB 4824出具的EMC测试报告不被接受作为ABNT NBR CISPR/IEC 61000标准项下INMETRO体系测试的替代文件。须由INMETRO认可的OL（实验室）依据适用INMETRO Portaria中规定的ABNT NBR标准重新完成EMC测试。此外，60Hz电网频率影响谐波发射测量——针对中国国内认证在50Hz下进行的EMC测试不涵盖60Hz运行，须在60Hz下重新测试。
gap.zht: 中國CNAS實驗室依據GB/T 17799或GB 4824出具的EMC測試報告不被接受作為ABNT NBR CISPR/IEC 61000標準項下INMETRO體系測試的替代文件。須由INMETRO認可的OL（實驗室）依據適用INMETRO Portaria中規定的ABNT NBR標準重新完成EMC測試。此外，60Hz電網頻率影響諧波發射測量——針對中國國內認證在50Hz下進行的EMC測試不涵蓋60Hz運行，須在60Hz下重新測試。

mandatory_status.target: not confirmed compulsory — verify current INMETRO portaria scope; EMC compliance under ABNT NBR CISPR/IEC 61000 series would apply if a confirmed INMETRO compulsory EVSE scheme is in force, but such a scheme could not be confirmed as of 2026-06-12
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 17799 / GB 4824 EMC compliance required; CCC may include EMC testing; GB tests conducted at 50 Hz

source.publisher: INMETRO — Instituto Nacional de Metrologia, Qualidade e Tecnologia (Brazil)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL — UNCONFIRMED] Whether EMC is a confirmed compulsory requirement for EVSE under an INMETRO Portaria could not be verified as of 2026-06-12 (framework actively evolving). The applicable EMC standards if such a scheme is confirmed would be ABNT NBR adoptions of CISPR and IEC 61000 series. Chinese GB/T EMC test reports would not be accepted as substitutes under the INMETRO pathway. The 60 Hz grid frequency requires re-testing even where Chinese EMC data exists.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考——未经确认】截至2026年6月12日，EMC是否作为INMETRO Portaria项下EVSE的确认强制要求尚未得到核实（框架仍在积极演变中）。若相关方案获得确认，适用EMC标准将为ABNT NBR采纳的CISPR和IEC 61000系列。中国GB/T EMC测试报告在INMETRO路径下不被接受为替代文件。即使已有中国EMC数据，60Hz电网频率也要求重新测试。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考——未經確認】截至2026年6月12日，EMC是否作為INMETRO Portaria項下EVSE的確認強制要求尚未得到核實（框架仍在積極演變中）。若相關方案獲得確認，適用EMC標準將為ABNT NBR採納的CISPR和IEC 61000系列。中國GB/T EMC測試報告在INMETRO路徑下不被接受為替代文件。即使已有中國EMC數據，60Hz電網頻率也要求重新測試。

requirement_topic.en: Anatel Homologation — Wireless/Radio Modules in EV Chargers
requirement_topic.zh: Anatel型号认证——充电设备中的无线/无线电模块
requirement_topic.zht: Anatel型號認證——充電設備中的無線/無線電模組

summary.en: If an EV charger incorporates any wireless communications module — including Wi-Fi (IEEE 802.11), Bluetooth, cellular (4G/5G), RFID/NFC, or other radio technologies — that module must be homologated (homologado) by Anatel (Agência Nacional de Telecomunicações — Brazil's telecommunications regulator) under Anatel's conformity assessment framework. Anatel homologation is separate from and in addition to INMETRO certification. Anatel Resolução 715/2019 (and its amendments) governs the homologation of telecommunications and radio products. For EV chargers with integrated communications, the wireless module must carry a valid Anatel homologation number, which must be printed on the label. If the charger uses a pre-homologated module from a third-party supplier, that module's existing Anatel homologation number may be referenced, but the integrated product configuration must still be assessed.
summary.zh: 若充电设备内置任何无线通信模块——包括Wi-Fi（IEEE 802.11）、蓝牙、蜂窝网络（4G/5G）、RFID/NFC或其他无线电技术——该模块须经Anatel（巴西电信管理局，巴西电信监管机构）在其合格评定框架下完成型号认证（homologação）。Anatel型号认证独立于INMETRO认证，需同时取得。Anatel第715/2019号决议（及其修正案）管理电信和无线电产品的型号认证。对于集成通信功能的充电设备，无线模块须具备有效的Anatel型号认证编号，该编号须印在标签上。若充电设备使用第三方供应商的预认证模块，可引用该模块现有的Anatel型号认证编号，但集成产品配置仍须接受评估。
summary.zht: 若充電設備內置任何無線通信模組——包括Wi-Fi（IEEE 802.11）、藍牙、蜂巢網路（4G/5G）、RFID/NFC或其他無線電技術——該模組須經Anatel（巴西電信管理局，巴西電信監管機構）在其合格評定框架下完成型號認證（homologação）。Anatel型號認證獨立於INMETRO認證，需同時取得。Anatel第715/2019號決議（及其修正案）管理電信和無線電產品的型號認證。對於集成通信功能的充電設備，無線模組須具備有效的Anatel型號認證編號，該編號須印在標籤上。若充電設備使用第三方供應商的預認證模組，可引用該模組現有的Anatel型號認證編號，但集成產品配置仍須接受評估。

standards_or_laws: Anatel Resolução No. 715/2019 — Homologation of telecommunications products (and amendments; check anatel.gov.br for current consolidated version)
Anatel Ato No. 14.448/2017 (and updates) — Technical requirements for homologation of wireless devices (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular)
Lei No. 9.472/1997 — General Telecommunications Law (Lei Geral de Telecomunicações — legal basis for Anatel's authority)

summary.en: In China, wireless modules in products require type approval under MIIT (Ministry of Industry and Information Technology) network access approval (网络进网许可) or SRRC (State Radio Regulatory Commission) radio type approval (无线电型号核准). These Chinese approvals are not recognised by Anatel and do not substitute for Anatel homologation. Chinese EV chargers with Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, or cellular modules that hold only Chinese MIIT/SRRC approval require separate Anatel homologation before being sold in Brazil.
summary.zh: 在中国，产品中的无线模块须取得工业和信息化部（MIIT）进网许可证（网络进网许可）或国家无线电管理委员会（SRRC）无线电型号核准。上述中国认可文件不被Anatel承认，不能替代Anatel型号认证。仅持有中国MIIT/SRRC批准的Wi-Fi、蓝牙或蜂窝模块的中国充电设备，在巴西销售前须另行取得Anatel型号认证。
summary.zht: 在中國，產品中的無線模組須取得工業和信息化部（MIIT）進網許可證（網絡進網許可）或國家無線電管理委員會（SRRC）無線電型號核准。上述中國認可文件不被Anatel承認，不能替代Anatel型號認證。僅持有中國MIIT/SRRC批准的Wi-Fi、藍牙或蜂巢模組的中國充電設備，在巴西銷售前須另行取得Anatel型號認證。

standards_or_laws: MIIT network access approval (进网许可) — required for cellular/wireless modules in China; not recognised by Anatel
SRRC radio type approval (无线电型号核准) — required for radio frequency devices in China; not recognised by Anatel

gap.en: Every wireless module in a Brazilian-market EV charger requires Anatel homologation — a separate certification process from INMETRO. Chinese MIIT/SRRC approvals are not accepted. Modern EV chargers typically include Wi-Fi or cellular for remote monitoring, RFID/NFC for user authentication, and sometimes Bluetooth for local control — each such module must be Anatel-homologated. The Anatel homologation number must appear on product labelling. For smart/networked chargers, this creates a parallel certification track that must be completed alongside (or before) INMETRO certification.
gap.zh: 巴西市场充电设备中的每个无线模块均须取得Anatel型号认证——这是独立于INMETRO的单独认证程序。中国MIIT/SRRC批准文件不被接受。现代充电设备通常集成Wi-Fi或蜂窝网络（用于远程监控）、RFID/NFC（用于用户认证），有时还集成蓝牙（用于本地控制）——每个此类模块均须通过Anatel型号认证。Anatel型号认证编号须印在产品标签上。对于智能/联网充电设备，这形成了一个须与INMETRO认证并行（或先行）完成的独立认证流程。
gap.zht: 巴西市場充電設備中的每個無線模組均須取得Anatel型號認證——這是獨立於INMETRO的單獨認證程序。中國MIIT/SRRC批准文件不被接受。現代充電設備通常集成Wi-Fi或蜂巢網路（用於遠端監控）、RFID/NFC（用於用戶認證），有時還集成藍牙（用於本地控制）——每個此類模組均須通過Anatel型號認證。Anatel型號認證編號須印在產品標籤上。對於智能/聯網充電設備，這形成了一個須與INMETRO認證並行（或先行）完成的獨立認證流程。

mandatory_status.target: conditional — applies only if wireless comms module present (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, RFID/NFC, or other radio technology); EV chargers without any wireless module are not subject to Anatel homologation
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory in China — MIIT network access / SRRC type approval required; not recognised by Anatel

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Anatel homologation applies ONLY if the EV charger integrates a cellular, Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, RFID/NFC, or other radio/wireless module. A charger with no wireless module is not subject to Anatel homologation. Where wireless modules are present, Chinese MIIT/SRRC approvals are not accepted — separate Anatel homologation is required, and the homologation number must appear on product labels.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】Anatel型号认证仅在充电设备集成蜂窝网络、Wi-Fi、蓝牙、RFID/NFC或其他无线电/无线模块时适用。无无线模块的充电设备不受Anatel型号认证约束。若存在无线模块，中国MIIT/SRRC批准文件不被接受——须另行取得Anatel型号认证，认证编号须印在产品标签上。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】Anatel型號認證僅在充電設備集成蜂巢網路、Wi-Fi、藍牙、RFID/NFC或其他無線電/無線模組時適用。無無線模組的充電設備不受Anatel型號認證約束。若存在無線模組，中國MIIT/SRRC批准文件不被接受——須另行取得Anatel型號認證，認證編號須印在產品標籤上。
